entries.label: desktop-app-editor
entries.source: screencapture of installed Figma.app (retina 3024x1898), logged in, Untitled draft open
entries.note: Figma MAC DESKTOP APP editor. TOP: dark tab strip (~40pt) = the window chrome: traffic lights left (grey=unfocused), home-icon tab, file tabs w/ figma-file glyph + title (active tab lighter w/ close x), + button, right grid icon. LEFT: UI3 icon rail File/Agents/Assets/Tools/Variables (icons + 10px labels, ~72pt wide) then light panel: file header 'Untitled v / Drafts Free', Pages (+search/+), Page 1, Layers, frame rows. RIGHT light panel: avatar/play/Share, Design|Prototype + zoom, Frame section, 'Copy to Figma Slides' button, Position/Alignment grid, Layout Flow icons, Dimensions W/H, Clip content checkbox. CANVAS: dark (#1e1e1e-ish) w/ selected frame, bottom floating toolbar (move/frame/rect/pen/text/comment/actions + second group w/ collab cursors, measure, dev </>) and h-scrollbar. Discount file names/survey modal (private/transient). Pixels stay local.
entries.assetDecision: Ground-truth reference of the real application for fidelity work — recreate the surface as closely as possible from it. Logged-in captures may contain the owner's private content; keep those local and use synthetic demo content in tracked surfaces.
